name: demeta-frontend
description: Open-source Codex skill and material-design showcase for authored flagship frontend experiences.

scripts.lint:manifests: for manifest in showcase/manifests/*.json; do node skills/demeta-frontend/scripts/evaluate-manifest.mjs "$manifest" || exit 1; done
scripts.verify:evidence: for manifest in showcase/manifests/*.json; do node skills/demeta-frontend/scripts/verify-project.mjs "$manifest" showcase || exit 1; done
scripts.verify:runtime-evidence: DEMETA_EVIDENCE_ROOT=test-results/runtime-evidence npm run audit:lighthouse && DEMETA_EVIDENCE_ROOT=test-results/runtime-evidence npm run audit:evidence && DEMETA_EVIDENCE_ROOT=test-results/runtime-evidence npm run verify:evidence-bindings
scripts.verify: npm run check:validator && npm run test:skill && npm run lint:manifests && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run verify:evidence-bindings && npm run verify:evidence && npm run test:e2e
scripts.verify:release: npm run verify && npm run verify:runtime-evidence
